d:
Pass-compatible password manager that stores passwords as encrypted (OpenPGP) text files. A community continuation of the original pass: project (GPL-3.0-only).

This app can also act as an Android WebAuthn/passkey Credential Provider, allowing stored credentials to satisfy passkey requests from other apps.

Features:

  • Clone an existing pass repository or start a new one
  • Create and organize password files
  • Sync with a remote Git repository
  • Decrypt and copy passwords
  • Automatically fill and save credentials in apps and supported browsers
  • Supports time-based one-time passwords (TOTP) for two-step authentication
  • Provides WebAuthn/passkey authentication to other apps
